memoryArtifacts.headline: Morgan Williams
memoryArtifacts.description: Morgan Williams married Katherine Cromwell, sister to Thomas Cromwell, Earl of Essex. Morgan Williams assumed the surname of Cromwell at the desire of King Henry VIII

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Sir, Knight Richard Williams alias Cromwell

Morgan ap William, a brewer from Glamorgan who settled at Putney and married Katherine Cromwell (born 1483) , the sister of Thomas Cromwell, who would become the famous chief minister to Henry VIII. The Cromwells acquired great wealth as occasional beneficiaries of Thomas's administration of the Dissolution of the Monasteries. 

Morgan Williams was born about 1465 in Lanishen, Gla, was son of William ap (Yeven) Ieuan of Wales and Joan (Tudor) ap Yevan
Brother of Morgan Williams, William ap (Gruffyd) Gruffydd andJohn Williams
Husband of Katherine Elizabeth (Cromwell) Williams — married 1494 in Putney Ale, Surrey, England
Husband of Catherine Cromwell — married 1494 in Putney Ale, Surry, England
Father of Elizabeth Cromwell, Richard (Williams) Cromwell and Walter Cromwell Williams Died 1494 in Putney, Derbyshire, England

 Father of Richard Williams, alias Cromwell; Walter Cromwell Williams; Henry Williams Cromwell; John Williams; Robert Williams and 1 other Brother of Sir John Williams, MP 
Occupation:Knight, Ale-Brewer, Innkeeper

zh.lifeSummary: 當Morgan ap William於1465年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申時，他的父親William Ap Yevan Williams22歲，母親The Fictitious Joan Tudor12歲。他於大約1494年與Katherine Cromwell在英國英格蘭素瑞普特尼結婚。他們至少是15個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他在英國素瑞普特尼被列為ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii。他去世於1520年在英國德比夏爾享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morgan ap William于1465年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根利亞尼申时，他的父亲William Ap Yevan Williams22岁，母亲The Fictitious Joan Tudor12岁。他于大约1494年与Katherine Cromwell在英国英格兰素瑞普特尼结婚。他们至少是15个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他在英国素瑞普特尼被列为ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii。他去世于1520年在英国德比夏爾享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: occupational name for a cobbler.
Slovenian: nickname for a talkative person, from lapati ‘to babble’, or a topographic name from dialect lap ‘abyss’. Compare Lapp 4.

variants.name: Lapp
meanings: German, English, and Dutch: from Middle High German and Middle English lappe, Middle Dutch lap ‘cloth, patch, rag’, a metonymic occupational name for a mender of clothes or shoes, or a nickname given to someone who wore ragged clothes or garments with loose folds, flaps, or hanging sleeves, or who had fleshy folds of skin on his face, neck, or body.

German: nickname for a simple-minded person, from Middle Low German lappe ‘fool’. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 1 above) is also found in France (mainly Alsace, also Lorraine).
English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French lappe ‘burdock’, perhaps for someone with a prickly character.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

variants.name: Memoli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Ciro, Francesco, Luciano, Natale, Nino.
Italian:
patronymic or plural form of a pet form of thepersonal name Guglielmo, Italian form of William .

variants.name: McElligott
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brigid, Brendan, Seamus.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uileagóid, a patronymic from a pet form of the Gaelic form of the personal name William .

variants.name: McWilliam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scottish Iain, Morag.

Scottish and Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uilleim, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of William , also Anglicized as Williamson in Scotland. The name is thought to be mainly Scottish in Ulster, though there has been some confusion with McQuillan in County Down. In Connacht, McWilliam was a branch of Burke .

variants.name: Wilcock
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): from the Middle English personal name Wilcoc, a pet form of William (composed of the elements Will 1 + the hypocoristic suffix -cok; see Cocke ).

variants.name: McWilliams
meanings: Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Uilleim, a patronymic from a Gaelicized form of William , with excrescent English -s. In Ireland it sometimes represents a partial Gaelicization of Welsh Williams .

variants.name: Lemmo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Donato, Gino.
Italian (southern): from the personal name Lemmo, a pet form of Guglielmo, an equivalent of William . Compare Lembo .

variants.name: Wilk
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Mariusz, Stanislaw, Tadeusz, Zygmunt, Andrzej, Bogdan, Boguslaw, Casimir, Krzysztof, Stanislawa, Boleslaw, Darek.

Polish: from the vocabulary word wilk ‘wolf’, probably applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble a wolf or connected with wolves in some way. Alternatively, from an Old Slavic personal name based on vlъkъ ‘wolf’.
English (Staffordshire): from Middle English Wilke, a pet form of William and probably a shortening of Wilkin . The usage was very likely Flemish in origin.

variants.name: Wilkin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Wilkin, a pet form of William introduced to England and Scotland by Flemings and Picards after the Norman Conquest.
North German: variant of   Wilken  .

variants.name: Gillam
meanings: English: variant of   Gilliam  .
Welsh: Anglicized form of   Gwilliam  .

variants.name: Lembo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Carmelo, Domenic, Pietro, Alfio, Amelio, Antonio, Biagio, Dante, Giovani, Giovanni.
Italian (southern): from a hypercorrected form of Lemmo, a pet form of Guglièlmo, an equivalent of William .

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

en.lifeSummary: When Morgan ap William was born in 1465, in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales, his father, William Ap Yevan Williams, was 22 and his mother, The Fictitious Joan Tudor, was 12. He married Katherine Cromwell about 1494, in Putney, Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 15 sons and 5 daughters. His occupation is listed as ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii in Putney, Surrey, England. He died in 1520, in Derbyshire, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morgan ap William est né en 1465, à Llanishen, Glamorgan, Galles, son père, William Ap Yevan Williams, avait 22 ans et sa mère, The Fictitious Joan Tudor, avait 12 ans. Il a épousé Katherine Cromwell environ 1494, à Putney, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 15 fils et 5 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii à Putney, Surrey, Angleterre. Il est décédé en 1520, à Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morgan ap William 1465 in Llanishen, Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Ap Yevan Williams 22 und seine Mutter The Fictitious Joan Tudor 12. Er hat um 1494 in Putney, Surrey, England, United Kingdom Katherine Cromwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 15 Söhne und 5 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii in Putney, Surrey, England aufgeführt. Er starb 1520 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Derbyshire, England.

Lui sposato Katherine Cromwell circa 1494, nel Putney, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 15 figli e 5 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii nel Putney, Surrey, England. Morì nel 1520, nel Derbyshire, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Morgan ap Williamが1465年にウェールズグラモーガンラニシェンで生まれた時，父William Ap Yevan Williamsは22歳，母The Fictitious Joan Tudorは12歳であった。約1494年にイギリスイギリススリープウトニーでKatherine Cromwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも15人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。イギリススリープウトニーでの職業はale brewer for henry vii and henry viiiと記録されている。彼は1520年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Morgan ap William(이)가 1465년 웨일스 글램르건 랜이셰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Ap Yevan Williams(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 The Fictitious Joan Tudor(은)는 12세였다. 그는 대략 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 풋니에서 Katherine Cromwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 수리 풋니에서 ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii이었다. 그는 1520년 영국 더비실르에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morgan ap William nasceu em 1465, em Llanishen, Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, William Ap Yevan Williams, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, The Fictitious Joan Tudor, tinha 12 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine Cromwell aproximadamente 1494, em Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 15 filhos e 5 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii em Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 1520, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morgan ap William родился в 1465 г. в местности лланишен, глэморган, Уэльс, его отцу по имени William Ap Yevan Williams было 22 года, а матери, которую звали The Fictitious Joan Tudor, 12. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine Cromwell около 1494 г. в местности путни, сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 15 сыновей и 5 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii в местности путни, сурри, Англия. Он умер в 1520 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Katherine Cromwell aproximadamente 1494, en Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 15 hijos y 5 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era ale brewer for henry vii and henry viii en Putney, Surrey, Inglaterra. Murió en 1520, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
